title: Getting Started with OpenClaw
content:
Welcome to OpenClaw

OpenClaw is a powerful AI assistant that helps you automate tasks and improve productivity.

Key Features

  • Task automation
  • Content generation
  • WordPress integration
  • Self-learning system

title: WordPress Integration Tutorial
content:
How to Integrate WordPress with OpenClaw

This tutorial will guide you through setting up WordPress REST API integration.

Steps

  1. Enable REST API
  2. Create Application Password
  3. Configure OpenClaw
  4. Test connection

title: Self-Learning AI Systems
content:
Building Self-Learning AI

Learn how AI agents can improve themselves through continuous learning from interactions.

Principles

  • Capture everything
  • Analyze patterns
  • Learn from mistakes
  • Update rules
  • Test improvements
